name: /start offers starter selection for new users

payload.text:
🎒 Hey there, Trainer!

Pick your starter Pokémon — this one will begin your journey!

name: selecting a starter prompts for trainer name

payload.text:
🎒 Hey there, Trainer!

Pick your starter Pokémon — this one will begin your journey!

Great choice — Charmander the Fire type!

Now, what's your trainer name? (2-20 characters)

name: completing onboarding with valid name grants starter

payload.text:
🎒 Hey there, Trainer!

Pick your starter Pokémon — this one will begin your journey!

Great choice — Squirtle the Water type!

Now, what's your trainer name? (2-20 characters)

🎉 Welcome, Ash! You received Squirtle as your starter!

Here's what you got:
• 3 Potions
• 5 Poké Balls

Tap a button below to start your adventure!
